interactionPlan.concept: Visualizing the effects of Gaussian derivatives at different scales on an image.

interactions.label: Sigma (σ) Value
interactions.teaches: Adjusting sigma demonstrates how scale affects the level of detail captured in the image derivative.

interactions.label: Show/Hide Original Image
interactions.teaches: Toggling helps compare the filtered and unfiltered images to see derivative effects.

interactions.label: Move Gaussian Center
interactions.teaches: Dragging shows the symmetry and influence of the Gaussian derivative across the image.

interactions.label: Compare Derivative Levels
interactions.teaches: Steps through coarse to fine scales to illustrate the selective emphasis on image features.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial view on a 3D plot showing the 2D Gaussian with its x-derivative, with a side view to highlight depth.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure that the transition between different sigma values is smooth to emphasize continuity in scale changes.

gpt-4o.notes: The interactivity is excellent, but the colors differ significantly from the original.
